title: Different Inventory
description: Pretties up the inventory and container textures while sticking to the Vanilla style.
body:
Are you someone who wishes Mojang updated Minecraft's inventory and container textures, but still enjoys the simple layout and color scheme? In my opinion, the vanilla inventory and container textures are good the way they are, but this pack makes them a little prettier without altering the style or colors.![Your Inventory with Different Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca44d71cb46218b5b15e244f18bf475677675963_0.webp)
(Check the Gallery page for more screenshots. All containers are retextured, although some may not be in the Gallery.)
